name: Dense Multi-Phase Gantt — 20+ Tasks
input: Create a Gantt chart for a 3-year NIH R01 grant project. Year 1 - Foundation: IRB Protocol Development (2024-01-01, 90d), Site Recruitment (after IRB, 60d), Staff Training (after Site Recruitment, 30d), Pilot Study (after Staff Training, 120d), Pilot Data Analysis (after Pilot Study, 45d). Year 2 - Main Study: Participant Enrollment (2025-01-01, 180d), Baseline Assessments (after Enrollment start, 150d), Intervention Delivery (after Baseline, 240d), 6-Month Follow-Up (after Intervention, 90d), 12-Month Follow-Up (after 6-Month, 90d). Year 3 - Analysis & Dissemination: Data Cleaning (2026-01-01, 60d), Statistical Analysis (after Data Cleaning, 90d), Manuscript Preparation (after Statistical Analysis, 120d), Conference Presentations (after Manuscript, 60d), Final Report (after Conference, 45d). Cross-cutting: DSMB Reviews (quarterly, mark as milestones), Progress Reports (annual). Mark critical path tasks.
qualityCriteria: Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: 3-year Gantt with 20+ tasks across 3 phases, dependencies, critical path markers, professional grant timeline.
